notes: TV overhaul: D-pad now moves Left/Right through Subtitles/Audio/Speed/Info (Up reaches Play/Pause); Back no longer exits the player from an open panel; Back after playing reopens the sources popup instead of dropping to Discover; audio language now correctly defaults to English (Japanese for anime); fixed green/corrupted picture and black-picture-with-audio on some streams (switched the video surface from TextureView to SurfaceView -- the common cause on TV-box hardware for 10-bit/HDR 4K content).
